business.name: Raleigh Cooling & Heating
business.tagline: Keeping Raleigh comfortable, one system at a time

hero.headline: AC quits at 3pm on a *Saturday?* We got you
hero.subheadline: No runaround, no upselling — just fast, honest HVAC work that actually fixes the problem the first time

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: AC, Heat, and Everything In Between
services_section.subheading: From quick thermostat swaps to full system replacements — we handle it all

services.title: Air Conditioning Repair & Installation
services.description: From emergency repairs when your AC dies mid-summer to complete system installations with ductless options. We explain everything, work fast, and get temperatures even throughout your home.

services.title: Heating System Service
services.description: Furnace acting up? We diagnose the real problem and fix it right. Whether it's a quick repair or full replacement, you'll have reliable heat when you need it most.

services.title: Thermostat Installation & Setup
services.description: Smart thermostats installed efficiently with full system explanation. We arrive early, work clean, and make sure you understand how to get the most from your new controls.

services.title: Complete System Replacement
services.description: Full HVAC replacements done right the first time. Simple process, fair quotes, and systems that work trouble-free for years. No regrets, just comfortable temperatures year-round.

about.heading: Straight Talk HVAC for Raleigh Families
about.body: We're the HVAC team that shows up when we say we will, explains what's actually wrong, and fixes it without the sales pitch. Whether it's a quick repair or major installation, we keep Raleigh homes comfortable with honest work and fair pricing. Ask our neighbors — they'll tell you the same thing.

reviews.name: Stanley A.
reviews.text: Needed ductless AC options and these guys really knew their stuff. Spent almost an hour explaining everything before the quick installation. Professional work all around.

reviews.name: Kaitlynn J.
reviews.text: Thermostat install went perfectly. They showed up early and took time to walk me through the new system. Been working great ever since.

reviews.name: Mladen M.
reviews.text: Fast scheduling, quick arrival, no nonsense service. Friendly tech who got it done right. Best HVAC experience I've had in Raleigh.

reviews.name: Ryan L.
reviews.text: Had both AC and furnace replaced 6 months ago. Zero issues since then, exactly what they quoted. Simple process, no regrets at all.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving the Triangle
service_areas.subheading: Fast, reliable HVAC service throughout the Raleigh area

cta.heading: Ready to Fix That HVAC Problem?
cta.body: Don't sweat it another day. Call now for fast service and honest pricing on all your heating and cooling needs.
